bird.name: Thick-billed seedeater
bird.summary: The thick-billed seedeater (Crithagra burtoni) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is native to the Western High Plateau a…

locations.name: 巴門達高原
locations.summary: 巴門達高原是非洲中西部國家喀麥隆的高原，受赤道多雨氣候影響，每年平均降雨量1,000至2,000毫米，是薩納加河主要支流的發源地。

locations.name: 比奥科岛
locations.summary: 比奥科岛（Bioko），原名“费尔南多波岛”（西班牙語：Fernando Poo），是非洲西海岸几内亚湾中的一个火山岛，属赤道几内亚管辖，该国前首都马拉博即位于岛上。该岛面积为2,017平方公里，人口33万人。該島嶼原為西班牙殖民地，因其…

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
locations.summary: The Albertine Rift montane forests (French: Forêts montagnardes du Rift Albertin) is a tropical moist broadleaf forest…

locations.name: East African montane forests
locations.summary: The East African montane forests is a montane tropical moist forest ecoregion of eastern Africa.

relations.subject: Thick-billed seedeater
relations.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau and Bioko, the Albertine rift montane forests and the East African montane forests
